statement: All 199 entries across 26 sessions use legacy schema {claim, evidence_type, script, output_hash} not canonical AEAL {claim_id, type, statement, evidence, confidence}; 995 field-level violations.
evidence: counted via read-only walk of session folders
recommendation: migrate to canonical schema OR formally re-spec AEAL in PCF-2 v1.3

statement: Duplicate claim_ids and verdict contradictions cannot be enumerated under current schema (claim_id and verdict fields absent).
